1.21.1.0.488.0:
### 0.488.0

**Official links now stay up to date**

The Discord invite, Patreon, donation and hosting-affiliate links now update themselves from the Dungeon Train server whenever you're online, so buttons in the menus always point at the current official destinations — even on older versions of the mod. Offline, the built-in links still work as before.

- Links refresh once per session from the title screen; no account data is sent
- Default donation amount is now $25 AUD (was $45)
1.21.1.0.487.0:
### 0.487.0

**In-game update notifications**

Dungeon Train now tells you inside the game when a newer version is available — an "Update available" badge appears next to the mod on the Mods screen. It only notifies; it never downloads or changes anything on its own, so you stay in control and update through your launcher as usual.

- "Update available" badge on the Mods screen when you're behind the latest release
- Notification only — no auto-download; update via CurseForge / Modrinth / your launcher
